subcodes.first_line: Say: Praise be unto Thee, O God of all created things and Educator of all contingent beings, inasmuch as Thou hast caused me to hear Thy sweetest call and shown me [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: قل لک الحمد یا اله الکائنات و مربی الممکنات بما اسمعتنی ندائک الاحلی و اریتنی
subcodes.subjects: @prayer for steadfastness; obedience, @power and sovereignty of God; omnipotence of God, @rejection, opposition and persecution, @knowledge; recognition of God, @praise and encouragement
